other: She applies {st:VibrationIgnition} with her S3 and upgraded defense. {st:VibrationExplosion} on her S2, S3, and upgraded defense.
She passively gains {st:Combustion} on herself at 20+ {st:StigmaWorkshopCelloCaseOne}, but gets reduced damage from it.
usage: Passively gains {st:StigmaWorkshopCelloCaseOne} with skill uses and with her passive, buffing her skills with more power and coin reuses. At 30 stacks, her S3 {skill:10216|03} upgrades to {skill:10216|06}, and her defense upgrades to {skill:10216|07}. Using her upgraded S3 will NOT consume stacks, but will disable her defense from upgrading on the next turn. User her upgraded defense will consume all stacks. The two skills are roughly the same but the upgraded S3 applies {st:ResultReduction} to enemies and 1 {st:Firstlight} to herself, while the upgraded defense deals more damage at low HP, heals herself, and gives her 3 {st:Firstlight}.

{st:Firstlight} from her upgraded S3/defense gives her more speed, {st:Combustion} application, and damage on her S3 and upgraded defense. With her passive active, it also lets her regain {st:StigmaWorkshopCelloCaseOne} faster.
Applies {st:DawnFaust} to {id:11009}, giving him more speed, power, and damage. Upgrades to {st:DawnFaustDying}, which is a stronger version, when she dies.
When other Dawn Office identities stagger enemies or use their S3s, she uses {skill:10216|05} as a follow up attack.

passiveBonusNotes: Assumes max stacks of Dawn Office from Dawn Office Rep. Gregor

1021601.desc:
When other Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities meet the following conditions, Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust uses the "Seconded Offensive" Skill against the targeted enemy (once per turn per Identity)
- At Base Skill Attack End: If the enemy that was hit is Staggered, use "Seconded Offensive" against said enemy
(Does not activate if the said enemy was already Staggered Before Attack of the said Skill)
- At Attack End of the following Skills, use "Seconded Offensive" on the enemy they hit (prioritizes Staggered targets):
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor's "Dawnsplitter" and "Crack of Dawn"
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair's "Stigmatize" and "Blazing[TabExplain] Strike"

If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair is on the field: On Hit using Reused Coins of Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust's Base Skills, deal additional Wrath damage equal to [Combustion] on targeted enemy (max 10; max 20 per turn)
- Counts as activating [Combustion]
1021601.name: Feuerfalter [Stigma Workshop]

1021602.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 0 [StigmaWorkshopCelloCaseOne]

Cannot be Staggered or fall below 1 HP due to [Combustion] damage
Take -50% damage from [Combustion] effects (rounded down)
- At less than 50% HP, take -75% damage from [Combustion] effects instead (rounded down)
1021602.name: Heatproof Coat

1021603.desc:
If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair is on the field, activate the following effects:
- Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair gains [DawnFaust]
- Turn Start: If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust is defeated, convert [DawnFaust] on Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair into [DawnFaustDying]
1021603.name: Seonbae

1021611.desc:
Combat Start: When this unit has [Firstlight], gain (Stack x 3) [StigmaWorkshopCelloCaseOne]

When other Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities meet the following conditions, Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust uses the "Seconded Offensive" Skill against the targeted enemy (once per turn per Identity)
- At Base Skill Attack End: If the enemy that was hit is Staggered, use "Seconded Offensive" against said enemy
(Does not activate if the said enemy was already Staggered Before Attack of the said Skill)
- At Attack End of the following Skills, use "Seconded Offensive" on the enemy they hit (prioritizes Staggered targets):
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor's "Dawnsplitter" and "Crack of Dawn"
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair's "Stigmatize" and "Blazing[TabExplain] Strike"

If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair is on the field: On Hit using Reused Coins of Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust's Base Skills, deal additional Wrath damage equal to [Combustion] on the targeted enemy (max 10; max 20 per turn)
- Counts as activating [Combustion]
1021611.name: Feuerfalter [Stigma Workshop]

1021621.desc: Combat Start: If there is only 1 surviving Identity, including Backup units, the said Identity gains 3 [AttackUp] and 3 [DefenseUp]
1021621.name: The Lone Fixer

data.desc:
[WideAreaRampage]
Activate the following effects on target with every hit of this Skill:
- Inflict 1 [Combustion] or 1 [Vibration]
- If target has no [VibrationIgnition], trigger [Switch_Vibration] into [VibrationIgnition] (once per target)
[WhenUse]
- Clash Power +3
- If the main target has 6+ ([Combustion] + [Vibration]), Coin Power +1 and Clash Power +2
- Inflict +2 [Combustion] Count on all targets
- Inflict +2 [Vibration] Count on all targets
[EndSkill]
- Inflict 1 [ResultReduction] next turn on all targets hit (once per turn)
- Gain 1 [Firstlight]
- Gain 1 [CaseOverheating]
data.name: Eject - High Noon

- Inflict +3 [Combustion] Count on all targets

[EndSkill]

- Gain 1 [CaseOverheating]
